subject: mobilenetv1-025-vww-int4-weight-only
notes: Eval set = last 10% of each class dir (sorted filenames), 10962 images total (10962 across 2 classes) -- the reference pipeline has no separately-labeled held-out test set (see module docstring). MLPerf Tiny reference ballpark: 80%+ top-1. Weight-only NNCF compression (nncf.compress_weights) -- activations and the matmul itself still execute fp32/fp16 on OpenVINO CPU, so this is a real accuracy number but NOT a measured or achievable throughput point; scripts/make_pareto.py projects its x-axis compute multiplier from issue #10's L0b soft-logic MAC densities, not from this run.
